overview: BizControl is an all-in-one business management app for small businesses, freelancers, and shopkeepers. Track income and expenses, generate GST invoices, verify QR payments safely, view financial analytics, and receive smart alerts — all in one place.
features: Expense & Income Tracker with categories and running balance
Invoice & GST Generator with PDF download
QR Payment Safety Checker using QR scan
Reports & Analytics with charts and date filters
Smart Alerts for low balance, unusual spending, and pending invoices
Freemium model with Stripe premium subscription (₹199/mo or ₹999/yr)
